note: All Neo Premier League media (images + video) lives in the public media library above, organised under robot/ and style/. No binaries are committed to this repo. Reference assets by `id`; download them from the library, or attach them when running a skill in a web chatbot.

assets.description: The robot on its own — clean front view. The base character.
The robot in 360 — five angles (front, 3/4, side, 3/4 back, back). The definitive character reference.
White; black chevrons + barcode-stripe blocks.
Black; all-over white liquid/marble distortion.
Black; chrome/metallic petal-burst around the collar and shoulders.
White; thin black pinstripes with black ringer collar/cuffs.
White; a horizontal halftone gradient band across the chest.
Greyscale; halftone orb motif over a vertical stripe fade.
Black/grey; bold diagonal stripes, collared polo cut.
Black; white vertical pinstripes with white ringer collar/cuffs.
